question: Three people check into a hotel room that costs $30. They each pay $10. Later the clerk realizes the room is only $25 and sends $5 with the bellboy. The bellboy keeps $2 and gives $1 back to each person. Now each person paid $9, totaling $27, plus the $2 the bellboy kept is $29. Where is the missing dollar?

no_search.note: mechanical false-positive probe; no gold to verify
